title: Hiring Production Engineer at ABB India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at ABB India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
ABB India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ABB India Capital India:
ABB India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India Capital India!
